item.title: Fleet management
item.intent: Fleet management must discover all running agents and aggregate health into a single view. Fleet-wide doctor must surface issues across all agents in one check.
item.description: FLEET OPERATOR: Multi-agent discovery + fleet-wide doctor is for the Fleet Operator persona managing agents for multiple people. Single pane of glass: see which agents are healthy, which need attention. Fleet-wide doctor means one check to confirm all agents are configured correctly. Not blocking single-user adoption. Acceptance: 'clawhq cloud fleet' discovers running agents; fleet health shows aggregate status; fleet doctor surfaces issues across all agents.
steps: Implement multi-agent discovery across running instances
Build health aggregation into single fleet view
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq cloud fleet' discovers all running agents
Fleet health shows aggregate status in single view
Fleet doctor surfaces issues across all agents in one check
